title: scutellaria × neumannii
intro: Scutellaria × neumannii, also known as skullcap, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family and is native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria × neumannii include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
